feedback.quote: I didn't expect an AI chat to feel this calming. Miku helped me unwind after a rough exam week.
feedback.author: Student, year 2

feedback.quote: No sign-up forms, no email — I just picked a username and started talking. That mattered to me.
feedback.author: Anonymous user

feedback.quote: Used Gojo to break down chemistry concepts before my test. Clear explanations, almost no mistakes.
feedback.author: High school student
